title.rendered: Restaurant Build Up and Restaurant General Contractor

content.rendered:
[vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1500556319702{background-color: #eeeeec !important;}”][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-offset-2 vc_col-lg-8 vc_col-md-offset-1 vc_col-md-10″]

[vc_column_text]

At Hood Builder, we are of the belief that a successful restaurant construction project starts with a clear vision and plan. The next step is to find experienced restaurant contractors to manage your design-build project from A to Z.

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column]
[/vc_column][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-7 vc_col-md-7″][vc_column_text]At Hood Builder, now serving customers throughout Denver, Colorado, we supply a team of leading restaurant contractors who are bound to exceed your expectations by producing eye-catching work at ultra-competitive prices, and always on schedule.

We have managed to set ourselves apart by always adapting to the many constant changes within the restaurant construction industry. At the same time, we have managed to maintain the highest level of performance on any sized project, making us one of the leading restaurant design firms in the country.

The Concept Phase

When you need restaurant general contracting services, your first step is to call us. Tell us about your project and the budget you have in mind. Before our restaurant general contractors get started, we will provide you with an accurate quote that includes restaurant construction, design, and material availability. This lets you remain informed throughout the process and engage in major decision making. After all, this is your project, so we want you to retain as much control over the process as possible. 

In addition to putting you in the driver’s seat, we also offer transparent communication. That means that we strive to provide detailed and honest information regarding all bids, project scopes, and levels of project quality.

We also understand that you have a schedule to keep. We want to be on-time as much as you do. Therefore, always stay mindful of your schedule requirements to provide you with accurate and highly competitive pricing.

The Construction Phase

At Hood Builder, we always maintain a clean and safe restaurant construction area that allows our contractors to be as efficient and productive as possible. We manage the costs while keeping to your budget and daily schedules to ensure they always mesh with your timeline.

Pre-Construction: 

When it comes to successful restaurant design, preparation is key. We will ensure that all information, equipment, and your preferences for the ideal restaurant are accounted for before we break ground. You will also have an opportunity to oversee the project while we keep you updated every step of the way.

 

General Contracting:

Our restaurant general contractors have supreme attention-to-detail, which enables them to complete all carpentry, paint, electrical, and other work with extreme precision. You will be happy with the final outcome of your restaurant’s design, we guarantee it!

 

Design/Build:

We can facilitate all design drawings and get to work, bringing your vision of the ideal restaurant to life. We can handle seating requirements, your commercial kitchen layout, dining room layout, parking lot layout, and all the rest for a restaurant people will love.

 

Drywall: 

Our restaurant contractors are experts at hanging drywall so that your restaurant remains looking and performing its best for years to come. We believe in doing the right job the first time around, and you should expect nothing less from our modern restaurant design experts.

 

Painting: 

Color is what will turn heads and make your patrons want to stay awhile. We can help you find the ideal colors and long-lasting paint brands to maintain the environment you’re after for ultimate customer satisfaction.

 

The Final Inspection: 

Once your restaurant construction and design project is finished, we will take you on a complete walk-through to show you the results of our expertise and attention-to-detail first-hand.

 

Our goal is to meet or beat your expectations while wowing your customers. Not only will you receive a final product that you can be proud of, but our restaurant general contractors will leave the project site clean and organized with no mess whatsoever.

For nearly thirty years, we have been providing clients of all sizes in a variety of industries with professional and expedient general contracting services. Reach out to us today, and we’ll show you why leading businesses like Pizza Hut, McDonald’s, British Airways and 3M regularly turn to us for all their general contracting needs.

For a full and honest price quote, contact Hood Builder today at 303-777-7720.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-offset-1 vc_col-lg-4 vc_col-md-offset-1 vc_col-md-4″][vc_wp_custommenu nav_menu=”12″ el_class=”wps-sidebar-related-links” title=”Related Links”]

Restaurant Services

Fire Protection

General Contracting

Hoods, MUA, Exhaust Fans

HVAC

Air Balancing
[/vc_column][vc_column]
[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”wps-full-width”][vc_column]
Get a Free Quote

We’ve got you covered. Hood Builder is a leading distribution, fabrication, and installation company for food facilities of any size. We have offices and plants across the United States that are ready to tend to your needs.

If you intend on receiving quotes from other installers in the industry, please be sure to compare the items included in the package in addition to price and reputation. Our objective is to always be your obvious choice. Please fill out the form below and and we will prepare a quote.

For a Full and Fast price Quote, Contact Hood Builder today at 303-777-7720.


    Please prove you are human by selecting the heart.

    [/vc_column][/vc_row]
